name: Chile Colorado
recipeIngredient: 20 Dried red chili pods, stems and seeds removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely grind the cilantro and cumin seeds in a spice grinder.
2. Put the ground seeds into the bowl of the food processor.
3. Break the chili pods into small pieces and coarsely grind them in the spice grinder, then add to the food processor bowl.
4. Add the garlic and onion to the food processor and process until the onions are chopped.
5. Add the remaining ingredients (oregano, warm water, and salt) to the food processor and process until pureed.
6. Place the mixture in a 2-quart casserole dish. Cover and microwave on medium-high power for twenty minutes, stirring after ten minutes.
Makes 3-1/2 cups.
